text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Focus... Focus on the race ahead... Extreme
close-up on the track!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best in the Mile Championship.
It's the highlight of my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is about to start and, for once, Agnes
Digital isn't focused on the other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not even focused on her rival for the day,
her beloved King Halo, who she was so worried
about before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay. Let's get to the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And when we get there—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Who's the star of the day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! It's me! Because I'm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King Halo! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo is there, happily revving up the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Look at King's aura! Look at those smooth,
velvety legs! Look at her vitality!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I knew it... Yes, I knew she could do it...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like there was nothing to worry about
after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, Digital, how do I strike you today?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Has my brilliance left you dizzy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're the very picture of recovery! There's
none of the imbalance that I sensed in the
summer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However, I get the feeling you haven't quite
reached the sleekness you had in the spring...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you can throw me off with your
weirdly specific observations...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But, tell me, how much do you love me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My love for you runs as deep as the Mariana
Trench. And your recent kindness to me has only
intensified my fixation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them smile. While King Halo hasn't
quite made a full comeback, it's clear she's been
making progress moving out of her recent slump.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been really looking forward to today, King!
I... I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I want to get to know the true you in today's race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh, you don't have to hope. I'll make sure of it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're prepared to fully embrace the
reality of what it means to be first-rate!
